notes: ByteDance's AI video-generation model family (Seedance 1.0 / 2.0, 2026); the video-side sibling of the Seedream image model, both under ByteDance's "Seed" foundation-model brand. Portmanteau of Seed + dance. STRESS: SEED-dance — say "seed" then "dance", NOT "see-dance". No documented creator pronunciation quote, but the Seed-prefix branding makes the split unambiguous across docs.
